title: Keep person tab open when selecting persons
excerpt: When you open the “People” column and select one person, the dropdown closes automatically. This means you have to reopen the dropdown each time you want to select another person. It would be more user-friendly if the dr…

posts.author: SeanM (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: When you open the “People” column and select one person, the dropdown closes automatically. This means you have to reopen the dropdown each time you want to select another person. It would be more user-friendly if the dropdown stayed open after each selection, allowing multiple people to be selected more efficiently.
